schema-designer.description: Designs database schemas and data models

api-designer.description: Designs API surfaces, REST endpoints, RPC methods, and function signatures

dependency-analyzer.description: Analyses project dependencies and module coupling

feature-dev.description: Implements new features by writing production code

bug-fixer.description: Diagnoses and fixes bugs with minimal correct patches

refactorer.description: Improves existing code without changing behaviour

test-writer.description: Writes unit, integration, and end-to-end test cases

test-runner.description: Executes test suites and reports pass/fail results

security-auditor.description: Audits code for security vulnerabilities and insecure patterns

perf-tester.description: Runs performance tests and benchmarks, reports quantitative results

requirements-analyzer.description: Analyses user requests and produces structured requirements with acceptance criteria

user-flow-mapper.description: Traces user-facing flows through the system and documents steps and edge cases

code-explorer.description: Explores the codebase to answer specific questions by reading files and tracing call chains

doc-searcher.description: Searches documentation, READMEs, comments, and external references for relevant information

benchmark-runner.description: Runs benchmarks and collects quantitative data with methodology notes

minutes-writer.description: Writes structured meeting minutes from transcripts including summary, decisions, and action items

compactor.description: Compacts long conversation transcripts into shorter summaries preserving decisions and action items
